content.text:
All four files have been created successfully. Here is a summary of what was created:

**Directories created:**
- `C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\src\app\(auth)\login\`
- `C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\src\app\(auth)\signup\`
- `C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\src\app\(auth)\callback\`
- `C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\src\app\api\health\`

**Files created:**

1. **`C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\src\app\(auth)\login\page.tsx`** (5,447 bytes) -- Login page with email/password authentication and Google OAuth. Uses Supabase client, shadcn/ui components (Card, Button, Input, Label, Separator), and sonner for toast notifications. Redirects to `/dashboard` on successful login.

2. **`C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\src\app\(auth)\signup\page.tsx`** (5,748 bytes) -- Signup page with full name, email, and password fields plus Google OAuth. Sends email confirmation and redirects to `/login` after successful registration.

3. **`C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\src\app\(auth)\callback\route.ts`** (927 bytes) -- OAuth callback route handler that exchanges the authorization code for a Supabase session. Handles both local development and production environments (with `x-forwarded-host` support). Falls back to `/login?error=auth` on failure.

4. **`C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\src\app\api\health\route.ts`** (193 bytes) -- Simple health check API endpoint returning JSON with status, timestamp, and version number.
